# Bank Reconciliation Module

Module ID: bank-reconciliation
Status: draft
Purpose: Tenant-scoped bank accounts, statement import mapping presets, CSV preview/dedup review, transaction matching corrections, exclusions, provisional clear/unclear state, and reconciliation completion.
Entrypoint: src/index.ts
Check: pnpm check:spec
Build: pnpm build
Test: pnpm test
Owned tables: bank_reconciliation_accounts, bank_reconciliation_imports, bank_reconciliation_transactions, bank_reconciliation_matches, bank_reconciliation_sessions, domain_events
Primary use cases: createBankAccount, listBankAccounts, listStatementImportFieldMappingPresets, detectStatementImportFieldMapping, previewStatementImportCsv, importStatementCsv, listStatementImports, importStatementTransactions, listStatementTransactions, suggestMatches, createMatch, unmatchTransaction, excludeTransaction, restoreExcludedTransaction, startReconciliation, clearReconciliationTransaction, unclearReconciliationTransaction, completeReconciliation, listReconciliations
Invariants: tenant/org scoped records, integer cents, statement transaction hash idempotency, no accounting-core imports, no reconciliation completion with unmatched in-period non-excluded transactions, excluded transactions are ignored by cleared-balance totals, reconciled transactions cannot be unmatched/excluded/restored/uncleared, clear/unclear is only allowed for in-progress reconciliation sessions, completion finalizes only transactions cleared for that session.
